description: Evaluation test cases for DocuSense Q&A system (Assignment 6)

cases.question: What is machine learning?
cases.notes: Direct definition question — should hit chunk-1 (Introduction)

cases.question: What are the types of machine learning?
cases.notes: Taxonomy question — should retrieve chunk-2 (Types of Learning)

cases.question: What metrics are used to evaluate machine learning models?
cases.notes: Specific technical question — should hit chunk-4 (Model Evaluation)

cases.question: What are the applications of machine learning in healthcare and finance?
cases.notes: Domain application question — should hit chunk-5 (Applications)

cases.question: What ethical concerns exist in machine learning?
cases.notes: Ethics question — should hit chunk-7 (Ethical Considerations)

cases.question: Who invented the Python programming language?
cases.notes: Out-of-scope question — no relevant chunks, system should say not found

cases.question: What is the current GDP of Germany?
cases.notes: Completely off-topic — should return no matches
